需悬停的微型扑翼机"" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="160" x="40" y="240" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="recall_box" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F5F2FA;strokeColor=#7E57C2;strokeWidth=1.5;dashed=1;dashPattern=8 4;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="400" width="320" x="240" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="recall_title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#7E57C2;" value="① 粗筛阶段（创新点 3 — 张量分解）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="22" width="320" x="240" y="112" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="recall_subtitle" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=10;fontColor=#9673A6;fontStyle=2;" value="目标：覆盖广 + 召回率高 + 毫秒级" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="18" width="320" x="240" y="135" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r_step1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E8E3F0;strokeColor=#7E57C2;strokeWidth=1;fontSize=10;verticalAlign=middle;align=center;" value="任务约束 → 查询矩阵 𝐐_raw" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="260" x="270" y="170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r_step2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E8E3F0;strokeColor=#7E57C2;strokeWidth=1;fontSize=10;verticalAlign=middle;align=center;" value="z-score 标准化 → 𝐐_norm
最小二乘投影 → 𝐪 ∈ ℝ^R (R=12)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="260" x="270" y="225" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r_step3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E8E3F0;strokeColor=#7E57C2;strokeWidth=1;fontSize=10;verticalAlign=middle;align=center;" value="混合相似度 sim = 0.6·cos_raw + 0.4·cos_embed
对 39 架 FWMAV 排序" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="260" x="270" y="290" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r_step4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#D6CCEA;strokeColor=#7E57C2;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=middle;align=center;" value="返回 Top-K 候选（默认 K=10）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="260" x="270" y="355" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r_perf" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=10;fontColor=#7E57C2;fontStyle=2;" value="🕐 时延 ≈ 几毫秒 · 无需 LLM 调用" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="260" x="270" y="445" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="topk_box" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#9673A6;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=10;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingTop=8;spacingLeft=10;" value="<b>Top-10 候选样机</b>

Nano Hummingbird (sim=0.91)
RoboBee X-Wing (sim=0.87)
KUBeetle-S (sim=0.84)
DelFly Nimble (sim=0.81)
… (6 个)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="160" width="160" x="600" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rerank_box" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FBF1EE;strokeColor=#B85450;strokeWidth=1.5;dashed=1;dashPattern=8 4;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="400" width="380" x="800" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rerank_title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#B85450;" value="② 精排阶段（创新点 2 — 工具增强路径推理）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="22" width="380" x="800" y="112" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rerank_subtitle" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=10;fontColor=#9C5048;fontStyle=2;" value="目标：物理可行 + 可解释 + 精排可信" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="18" width="380" x="800" y="135" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rerank_loop_label" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#B85450;" value="对每个候选执行：" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="200" x="820" y="165" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rr_step1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F8E0DA;strokeColor=#B85450;strokeWidth=1;fontSize=10;verticalAlign=middle;align=left;spacingLeft=8;" value="hassanalian_weight(任务约束)
复核物理可行重量" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="42" width="320" x="830" y="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rr_step2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F8E0DA;strokeColor=#B85450;strokeWidth=1;fontSize=10;verticalAlign=middle;align=left;spacingLeft=8;" value="shyy_scaling_law(候选重量)
比较候选参数与尺度律预测的偏离度" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="42" width="320" x="830" y="245" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rr_step3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F8E0DA;strokeColor=#B85450;strokeWidth=1;fontSize=10;verticalAlign=middle;align=left;spacingLeft=8;" value="strouhal_check / reynolds_check
气动机理判别（St ∈ [0.2, 0.4]？）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="42" width="320" x="830" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rr_step4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F8E0DA;strokeColor=#B85450;strokeWidth=1;fontSize=10;verticalAlign=middle;align=left;spacingLeft=8;" value="query_mimics_path(候选, dominant_type)
检查仿生主导维度与任务匹配" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="42" width="320" x="830" y="355" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rr_summary" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#EFD5D0;strokeColor=#B85450;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=middle;align=center;" value="LLM 综合校验结果重新排序，淘汰物理不可行候选" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="320" x="830" y="410" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rr_perf" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=10;fontColor=#B85450;fontStyle=2;" value="🕐 LLM 调用次数 ≈ Top-K × 4 · 比对全图调用降 ~75%" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="22" width="380" x="800" y="465" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="output_box" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E8EFF5;strokeColor=#3A6B8A;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=10;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingTop=8;spacingLeft=10;" value="<b>最终输出</b>

<b>Top-3 推荐</b>
1. Nano Hummingbird ✓
2. KUBeetle-S ✓
3. DelFly Nimble ⚠️

附：
• 物理校验报告 (JSON)
• 推理路径 P
• 4 类相似度通道证据" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="240" width="160" x="1220" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="query" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_rr12" edge="1" parent="1" source="rr_step1" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#B85450;strokeWidth=1.4;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#B85450;strokeWidth=1.4;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" target="rr_step3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_rr34" edge="1" parent="1" source="rr_step3" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#B85450;strokeWidth=1.4;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" target="rr_step4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_rr4s" edge="1" parent="1" source="rr_step4" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#B85450;strokeWidth=1.4;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" target="rr_summary"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_out" edge="1" parent="1" source="rr_summary" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#3A6B8A;strokeWidth=2;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.6;" target="output_box"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="footer" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=10;fontColor=#666;fontStyle=2;" value="系统级创新点：将"语义匹配"（粗筛）与"物理可行"（精排）解耦——前者由张量嵌入空间快速 KNN 完成，后者由 LLM 调用领域物理工具完成；
Top-K 限制使精排阶段的工具调用开销可控。该范式是论文实验部分（5.5 + 5.6 节）方案推荐任务的核心评测对象。" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="1340" x="40" y="525" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.div:
最终输出
Top-3 推荐
1. Nano Hummingbird ✓
2. KUBeetle-S ✓
3. DelFly Nimble ⚠️

display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#666, #000000); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-style: italic; white-space: nowrap;

div.div:
系统级创新点：将"语义匹配"（粗筛）与"物理可行"（精排）解耦——前者由张量嵌入空间快速 KNN 完成，后者由 LLM 调用领域物理工具完成；
Top-K 限制使精排阶段的工具调用开销可控。该范式是论文实验部分（5.5 + 5.6 节）方案推荐任务的核心评测对象。
